name: ma2h-skills
description: The agent-native MA2H toolkit: 'implement' builds a conformant MA2H Hub in your app (any language/framework, graded against the conformance vectors); 'build-notify' / 'build-ask' / 'build-task' generate app-specific sender skills your agents invoke to reach a human; 'build-inbox' generates the agent-side skill to drain the mailbox and act on human->agent directives (the v0.4 inbound leg). Skills are independent — use only what you need.
